headline: PT morning, Day 187 — the new Signal board reduces the week to one keystone move: post Batch 1 to the LinkedIn pages, and the PhantomBuster gate every outreach waits behind finally opens. Same 8 AM window flips the EIN from waited-on (its window closed Jul 11) to called-in.
source: index.html · ORAYA DATA block v15.1 (Signal, updated 2026-07-16)

spotlight.title: Post Batch 1 to the LinkedIn pages — open the outreach gate
spotlight.detail: The company page is still blank and 'they see that it's blank, then they go away' — a live feed is the hard gate on EVERY PhantomBuster sequence. Batch 1 (~6 reels) was declared ready Jul 12. It's 7:30 PM IST / 7 AM PT (both awake): mutually select the strongest reels, post to the personal + Hanflux/Oraya company pages, and the first Phantom (connect-request vs page-invite) can launch the same day. Search appearances are already +430% on the name alone.

spotlight.title: Send the Mercedes re-pitch reply + book the agent-demo call
spotlight.detail: They finally replied and we've owed the response since Jul 10. Weapon is their own chatbot's multi-day delay — attach the timestamped screenshots, pitch voice AI + automation, then book a live call where the Oraya agent itself dials them. Draft the receipts-reply and lock the demo slot.

spotlight.title: Generate Batch 3 (12–13 reels) + clear the 2-min autoloop fix
spotlight.detail: Attach the video-gen MCP to the growth engine and ingest Prompt P10 (Meeting-37 feedback) before generating: 6–7 insurance-vertical reels on Frankie's real Mutual-of-Omaha story, plus the Batch-2 fixes — consultancy voice everywhere, no blank end screens, subtitles off key visuals, new DMS tagline. While in System Settings, clear the autoloop's Full Disk Access toggle — it's been frozen at cycle 10 for 18 days on that one switch.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-faxed Jun 28; the '~8 business days' window closed Jul 11 and today's sweep still shows zero signal. The wait is over — in the 8 AM PT window, call the IRS EIN line and check RedFax (510-497-1224). It gets chased by phone now, not waited on.

blockers.label: Autoloop
blockers.detail: Frozen at cycle 10 for 18 days on a 2-minute fix: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access for the launchd runner. Every autonomous cycle is stalled behind this one toggle.

tasks.lead: Post Batch 1 to LinkedIn — personal + company pages
tasks.detail: The keystone. A live company feed is the hard gate on every PhantomBuster sequence; Batch 1 was declared ready Jul 12. Co-select the reels with Chitraksh (both awake at the PM edition) and post to both pages today.

tasks.lead: Send the Mercedes re-pitch reply + book the agent-demo call
tasks.detail: Overdue since Jul 10. Attach their own chatbot's delay screenshots, pitch voice AI + automation, and book a live call where the Oraya agent dials them itself.

tasks.lead: EIN: call the IRS line + check RedFax 510-497-1224
tasks.detail: 8 AM PT window. The ~8-business-day fax window closed Jul 11 with zero signal — stop waiting, chase it by phone this morning.

Run the P6 combined-founder outline through Fable on the shared account, polish to a final annotated script, and write the P7 insurance brief for Frankie's real Mutual-of-Omaha story. Test Fable 'with everything' vs Opus before it expires Jul 19. Due next session.

tasks.lead: Jharkhand: scan the investor network for a US investor
tasks.detail: Father's direct CM (Hemant Soren) access is the moat — even $10–20M reportedly gets 'the best deal in the country.' Bring findings to the next sync (agenda a6).

Attach the video-gen MCP to the growth engine and ingest Prompt P10 (Meeting-37 feedback) first: 6–7 insurance-vertical reels + the Batch-2 fixes (consultancy voice everywhere, no blank end screens, subtitles off key visuals, new DMS tagline).

tasks.lead: Autoloop: clear the Full Disk Access toggle (2 min)
tasks.detail: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access for the launchd runner. Frozen at cycle 10 for 18 days on this one switch.

tasks.lead: Fix the TCPA reel visuals + subtitle layer
tasks.detail: Copy is approved ('that's fire') and the $1,500/call figure is Stage-A verified — only regenerate visuals and lift the subtitle layer off the key footage. Name the on-screen certifications (open item).

tasks.lead: Regenerate the DMS reel with the approved voice
tasks.detail: Consultancy-reel voice; have the growth engine propose 2–3 new end-card taglines (the old one was rejected as 'horrible'). Dealership content sits behind insurance for Batch 3.

tasks.lead: Once Batch 1 is posted: pick the first Phantom
tasks.detail: Connect-request vs page-invite, dealership GMs/CEOs (CA first) using Prompt P8. Can start same day the content goes live — gated only on the LinkedIn post above.
Build the page with the downloadable investor brochure (Frankie's artifact is done). Parked infra debt: ATTOM key (401) + BatchData $0 only matter to the paused p2 consumer funnel.

Curated from the v15.1 Signal board (not the frozen v14 auto-parse), published to Vercel, dropped as a Gmail draft, and handed to the n8n SCHEDULE workflow for the real send. First delivered brief since Jul 15 AM — today's AM scaffold generated but was left uncurated/unpublished.

tasks.lead: Cofounder inbox sweep — 4th straight quiet sweep
tasks.detail: 0 flagged threads in 72h+ (newest still Jun 26); nothing needed a reply. EIN escalation is the only open external thread and it's now a phone-chase, not an inbox wait.
launchd still erroring on Full Disk Access; resumes the moment Chitraksh clears the toggle (see Blockers).
AM sweep shipped v15.1 (EIN escalation noted, w1 refreshed); PM deltas folded into this brief. index.html stays read-only — edits happen only in the DATA block via the patch template.

tasks.lead: Max-autonomy holds; outward sends stay human-gated
tasks.detail: No permission-asking on routine tasks. Any send/publish/spend remains incapable without explicit human approval (guardrails).

done.what: Ran the Wed Jul 15 AM cofounder sweep ~30 min ahead of the 6:30 brief — live inbox scan, transcript check, autoloop log verification, dashboard record card + cockpit marker, pushed to Vercel (commit b74f9ac), memory updated

Scanned the connected inbox live: 0 items flagged, third straight silent sweep — zero threads in the last 72h and zero EIN/IRS/A2P/Envision/Honda/Greg/Mo/Theresa/cancel/opt-in hits across the last 20 days, while the account's in:inbox still returns its normal ~21 threads (newest unchanged since the Jun 26 Anthropic notice, so the quiet is real, not an auth failure). Nothing needed a reply — zero drafts queued

EIN: two full days past Monday Jul 13's standing plan (IRS call and/or RedFax check) with zero email-side confirmation either way — logged red on the dashboard as still open. A2P → FBN → SMS chain stays queued behind it

No new meeting/WhatsApp transcripts since the May 18 Retell snapshots — Daily Tasks board unchanged; only routine daily-brief artifacts (Jul 13-14 editions) moved in the HQ folder since the last sweep

Verified oraya-autoloop/logs/launchd.err.log directly rather than assuming last sweep's note still held: every retry still fails 'Operation not permitted', state.json still untouched since Jun 28 — confirms cycle 10, now day 17 frozen, root cause unchanged

Dashboard: appended the dated Wed Jul 15 record card (inbox / EIN / transcripts / autoloop / bottleneck), refreshed the top-bar cockpit sweep marker to Jul 15, pushed cleanly via a fresh unique /tmp clone (commit b74f9ac) — no stale-clone ownership issue this run

Memory: updated the dashboard-architecture memory's "latest push" pointer to v14.2 / b74f9ac with current EIN + autoloop state; re-verified the autoloop memory's Jul 7 TCC/Full-Disk-Access diagnosis is still accurate, so left it unchanged

waiting.what: CONFIRM what happened with Monday's EIN plan (IRS call and/or RedFax check at 510-497-1224) — two days later there's still no signal either way; this is now the oldest open blocker (re-fax went out ~Jun 28)

SEND the $0 B2B HR email (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits) — still unsent across every open-inbox morning since Jun 30: confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders still in role, reveal work emails, fire touch 1 from 09_b2b_hr_lane/
FASTEST first booked appointment (~$50-70, 15 min): open + fund Lob and approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, QR-attributable

5-min Full Disk Access toggle to unfreeze the autoloop (re-confirmed still frozen at cycle 10, day 17) + the 1-min ATTOM key refresh while you're in there (new key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key)
Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane); token already created + tested
